# CCR Kennels

> Veteran-owned Italian Cane Corso breeder in Centralia, Illinois. AKC registered puppies with champion bloodlines, DNA health testing, and a 2-year health guarantee.

## About
- [Homepage](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/): Overview of CCR Kennels, services, adoption process, and FAQs
- [Health Guarantee](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/health-guarantee): 72-hour health guarantee and 24-month congenital guarantee details
- [Purchase Agreement](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/purchase-agreement): Full puppy purchase contract terms

## Available Litters
- [Spring 2026 Litter](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/spring-litter-2026.html): Dam Liberty x Sire Legion, born March 30, 2026 — 12 puppies (8 females, 4 males)

## Breed Education
- [Cane Corso Breed Guide](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-breed-guide): Size, temperament, history, and care requirements
- [Cane Corso Pros and Cons](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-pros-and-cons): Balanced ownership assessment
- [Food and Nutrition Guide](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-food-and-nutrition): Weight-based feeding guidelines by life stage
- [Health Problems Guide](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-health-problems): Common breed health concerns and prevention
- [DNA Health Testing](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-health-testing): Genetic screening protocols and tested conditions
- [Puppy Training Milestones](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-puppy-training-milestones): Age-staged training timeline from 8 weeks to 2 years
- [Temperament and Training](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-temperament-and-training): Understanding Cane Corso behavior and training approaches
- [Training Tips](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-training-tips): Practical training advice for Cane Corso owners
- [Puppy Preparation Guide](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-puppy-prep): How to prepare your home for a Cane Corso puppy
- [Ear Cropping Guide](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/ear-cropping-cane-corso): Ear cropping information and aftercare
- [Breeding Guide](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/how-to-breed-cane-corso): Responsible Cane Corso breeding practices
- [Rescue and Adoption](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/cane-corso-rescue-adoption): Cane Corso rescue resources and adoption guidance
- [Finding the Right Vet](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/finding-the-right-vet-for-your-cane-corso): How to choose a veterinarian for your Cane Corso
- [Breeding Contracts](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/companion-vs-show-breeding-contracts): Companion vs show breeding contract differences
- [Choosing a Leash](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/choosing-a-leash-for-your-cane-corso): How to choose the right leash type, material, and length for a Cane Corso
- [Estimating Adult Weight](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/blog/estimating-cane-corso-adult-weight): Formula to estimate your Cane Corso puppy's adult weight using the 16 week multiplier

## Forms
- [Adoption Application](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/adoption-application): Puppy application form
- [Security Deposit](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/security-deposit): $500 non-refundable deposit to reserve a puppy
- [Purchase Agreement](https://www.ccrcorsos.com/purchase-agreement): Full contract terms
